STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CHANIN, HERMAN CHANIN, MIRIAM ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,550.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00, STIPULATED (INTERPLEADER) THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,550.00 SHALL BE SHARED EQUALLY BETWEEN HERMAN CHANIN & MIRIAM CHANIN. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
